ingredients: 1 cup dill sprigs (plus 1/3 cup chopped dill for coating)
steps: Coarsely grind peppercorns, fennel and caraway; mix with salt and sugar.
Lay salmon on plastic wrap on a plate. Cover with salt-sugar mixture, dill sprigs, and aquavit if using. Wrap tightly.
Refrigerate 48-72 hours, turning every 12 hours and redistributing the brine.
Unwrap, discard brine and dill, rinse salmon briefly and pat dry.
Press the flesh side into chopped dill to coat. Slice thinly on the diagonal and serve.
tips: Use very fresh salmon and keep it cold; slice thinly against the grain for the best texture.
